query:
-- Most recent voice_calls with their sessionIds
SELECT vc.id, vc.vapiCallId, vc.sessionId, vc.callerPhone, vc.outcome, 
  LEFT(vc.summary, 80) as summary, vc.createdAt
FROM voice_calls vc
WHERE vc.callerPhone = '+13029816191'
ORDER BY vc.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;

-- Most recent conversation_sessions for this phone
SELECT cs.id, cs.leadPhone, cs.stage, cs.leadName, cs.quotedPrice, cs.createdAt
FROM conversation_sessions cs
WHERE cs.leadPhone = '+13029816191'
ORDER BY cs.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT vc.id, vc.vapiCallId, vc.sessionId, vc.callerPhone, vc.outcome, 
  LEFT(vc.summary, 80) as summary, vc.createdAt
FROM voice_calls vc
WHERE vc.callerPhone = '+13029816191'
ORDER BY vc.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;

-- Most recent conversation_sessions for this phone
SELECT cs.id, cs.leadPhone, cs.stage, cs.leadName, cs.quotedPrice, cs.createdAt
FROM conversation_sessions cs
WHERE cs.leadPhone = '+13029816191'
ORDER BY cs.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
